mapper.sql: select id, template_name, warehouse_id, tenant_id, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_by, delete_time from bas_apply_template
mapper.select:
select t.id, t.template_name, t.warehouse_id, t.tenant_id, t.remark, t.del_flag, t.delete_by, t.delete_time, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, w.id as wId, w.name as warehouseName from bas_apply_template t left join fd_warehouse w on t.warehouse_id = w.id
and (t.del_flag = 0 or t.del_flag is null) and (t.tenant_id = #{tenantId} or t.tenant_id is null) and t.template_name like concat('%', #{templateName}, '%')
order by t.create_time desc

select t.id, t.template_name, t.warehouse_id, t.tenant_id, t.remark, t.del_flag, t.delete_by, t.delete_time, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, w.id as wId, w.name as warehouseName, e.id as entry_id, e.paren_id as entry_paren_id, e.material_id as entry_material_id, e.qty as entry_qty, e.sort_order as entry_sort_order, m.code as material_code, m.name as material_name, m.speci as material_speci from bas_apply_template t left join fd_warehouse w on t.warehouse_id = w.id left join bas_apply_template_entry e on e.paren_id = t.id and (e.delete_time is null) left join fd_material m on e.material_id = m.id where t.id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into bas_apply_template
template_name, warehouse_id, tenant_id, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time,
#{templateName}, #{warehouseId}, #{tenantId}, #{remark}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},
mapper.update: update bas_apply_template set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update bas_apply_template_entry set delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now() where paren_id = #{parenId} and (delete_time is null)
mapper.insert:
insert into bas_apply_template_entry(paren_id, material_id, qty, sort_order) values
(#{item.parenId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.qty}, #{item.sortOrder})
